SubItem.Name: Ch0 ADC Raw Value
SubItem.Comment: Input 0 ADC raw data. Used for adjustment.

SubItem.Name: Ch1 ADC Raw Value
SubItem.Comment: Input 0 ADC raw data. Used for adjustment.

SubItem.Name: Ch2 ADC Raw Value
SubItem.Comment: Input 2 ADC raw data. Used for adjustment.

SubItem.Name: Ch3 ADC Raw Value
SubItem.Comment: Input 3 ADC raw data. Used for adjustment.

SubItem.Name: Ch4 ADC Raw Value
SubItem.Comment: Input 4 ADC raw data. Used for adjustment.

SubItem.Name: Ch5 ADC Raw Value
SubItem.Comment: Input 5 ADC raw data. Used for adjustment.

SubItem.Name: Ch6 ADC Raw Value
SubItem.Comment: Input 6 ADC raw data. Used for adjustment.

SubItem.Name: Ch7 ADC Raw Value
SubItem.Comment: Input 7 ADC raw data. Used for adjustment.

SubItem.Name: Ch0 Enable/Disable
SubItem.Comment: Set to enable or disable the Input 0. False : Disable True : Enable

SubItem.Name: Ch1 Enable/Disable
SubItem.Comment: Set to enable or disable the Input 1. False : Disable True : Enable

SubItem.Name: Ch2 Enable/Disable
SubItem.Comment: Set to enable or disable the Input 2. False : Disable True : Enable

SubItem.Name: Ch3 Enable/Disable
SubItem.Comment: Set to enable or disable the Input 3. False : Disable True : Enable

SubItem.Name: Ch4 Enable/Disable
SubItem.Comment: Set to enable or disable the Input 4. False : Disable True : Enable

SubItem.Name: Ch5 Enable/Disable
SubItem.Comment: Set to enable or disable the Input 5. False : Disable True : Enable

SubItem.Name: Ch6 Enable/Disable
SubItem.Comment: Set to enable or disable the Input 6. False : Disable True : Enable

SubItem.Name: Ch7 Enable/Disable
SubItem.Comment: Set to enable or disable the Input 7. False : Disable True : Enable

SubItem.Name: Ch0 Range Setting
SubItem.Comment: Set the input range for Input 0.

SubItem.Name: Ch1 Range Setting
SubItem.Comment: Set the input range for Input 1.

SubItem.Name: Ch2 Range Setting
SubItem.Comment: Set the input range for Input 2.

SubItem.Name: Ch3 Range Setting
SubItem.Comment: Set the input range for Input 3.

SubItem.Name: Ch4 Range Setting
SubItem.Comment: Set the input range for Input 4.

SubItem.Name: Ch5 Range Setting
SubItem.Comment: Set the input range for Input 5.

SubItem.Name: Ch6 Range Setting
SubItem.Comment: Set the input range for Input 6.

SubItem.Name: Ch7 Range Setting
SubItem.Comment: Set the input range for Input 7.

SubItem.Name: Ch0 Disconnection Detection Status
SubItem.Comment: Indicate whether the input 0 is disconnected or not. False: Normal True: Disconnection Detected.

SubItem.Name: Ch1 Disconnection Detection Status
SubItem.Comment: Indicate whether the input 1 is disconnected or not. False: Normal True: Disconnection Detected.

SubItem.Name: Ch2 Disconnection Detection Status
SubItem.Comment: Indicate whether the input 2 is disconnected or not. False: Normal True: Disconnection Detected.

SubItem.Name: Ch3 Disconnection Detection Status
SubItem.Comment: Indicate whether the input 3 is disconnected or not. False: Normal True: Disconnection Detected.

SubItem.Name: Ch4 Disconnection Detection Status
SubItem.Comment: Indicate whether the input 4 is disconnected or not. False: Normal True: Disconnection Detected.

SubItem.Name: Ch5 Disconnection Detection Status
SubItem.Comment: Indicate whether the input 5 is disconnected or not. False: Normal True: Disconnection Detected.

SubItem.Name: Ch6 Disconnection Detection Status
SubItem.Comment: Indicate whether the input 6 is disconnected or not. False: Normal True: Disconnection Detected.

SubItem.Name: Ch7 Disconnection Detection Status
SubItem.Comment: Indicate whether the input 7 is disconnected or not. False: Normal True: Disconnection Detected.

SubItem.Name: Ch0 Over Range Status
SubItem.Comment: Indicate whether Analog value over-range at input 0 is detected or not. False: Normal True: Over Range Detected.

SubItem.Name: Ch0 Under Range Status
SubItem.Comment: Indicate whether Analog value under-range at input 0 is detected or not. False: Normal True: Under Range Detected.

SubItem.Name: Ch1 Over Range Status
SubItem.Comment: Indicate whether Analog value over-range at input 1 is detected or not. False: Normal True: Over Range Detected.

SubItem.Name: Ch1 Under Range Status
SubItem.Comment: Indicate whether Analog value under-range at input 1 is detected or not. False: Normal True: Under Range Detected.

SubItem.Name: Ch2 Over Range Status
SubItem.Comment: Indicate whether Analog value over-range at input 2 is detected or not. False: Normal True: Over Range Detected.

SubItem.Name: Ch2 Under Range Status
SubItem.Comment: Indicate whether Analog value under-range at input 2 is detected or not. False: Normal True: Under Range Detected.

SubItem.Name: Ch3 Over Range Status
SubItem.Comment: Indicate whether Analog value over-range at input 3 is detected or not. False: Normal True: Over Range Detected.

SubItem.Name: Ch3 Under Range Status
SubItem.Comment: Indicate whether Analog value under-range at input 3 is detected or not. False: Normal True: Under Range Detected.

SubItem.Name: Ch4 Over Range Status
SubItem.Comment: Indicate whether Analog value over-range at input 4 is detected or not. False: Normal True: Over Range Detected.

SubItem.Name: Ch4 Under Range Status
SubItem.Comment: Indicate whether Analog value under-range at input 4 is detected or not. False: Normal True: Under Range Detected.

SubItem.Name: Ch5 Over Range Status
SubItem.Comment: Indicate whether Analog value over-range at input 5 is detected or not. False: Normal True: Over Range Detected.

SubItem.Name: Ch5 Under Range Status
SubItem.Comment: Indicate whether Analog value under-range at input 5 is detected or not. False: Normal True: Under Range Detected.

SubItem.Name: Ch6 Over Range Status
SubItem.Comment: Indicate whether Analog value over-range at input 6 is detected or not. False: Normal True: Over Range Detected.

SubItem.Name: Ch6 Under Range Status
SubItem.Comment: Indicate whether Analog value under-range at input 6 is detected or not. False: Normal True: Under Range Detected.

SubItem.Name: Ch7 Over Range Status
SubItem.Comment: Indicate whether Analog value over-range at input 7 is detected or not. False: Normal True: Over Range Detected.

SubItem.Name: Ch7 Under Range Status
SubItem.Comment: Indicate whether Analog value under-range at input 7 is detected or not. False: Normal True: Under Range Detected.

SubItem.Name: Ch0 Display Data Format
SubItem.Comment: Set the input data display format for Input 0.

SubItem.Comment: Set the input data display format for Input 7.

SubItem.Comment: Set the output range for Output Ch0.

SubItem.Comment: Set the output range for Output Ch2.

SubItem.Comment: Set the output range for Output Ch3.

SubItem.Name: SubIndex 000
SubItem.Comment: Number of Input Data Set Entries

SubItem.Name: SubIndex 000
SubItem.Comment: Number of Input Data Set Entries

SubItem.Comment: Set the filter time of input Ch0.
